title: Initial podman build
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Adds the build command to podman which calls 'Buildah bud' under the covers to build a container.
This PR is replacing #30.  I'd a really ugly git mess up and this was the cleanest out.  I hopefully have merged everything appropriately in this PR and have addressed review comments from the previous rounds.

comments.body: Also update the README.md and the transfer.md

:pushpin: Commit 1ea71bf has been approved by `rhatdan`
